observations.title: DevHub home read-only page structure review
validation_message_expectations: Reviewer confirms no validation messages are expected on the synthetic home queue item.
Reviewer records any observed validation text as a cited follow-up item instead of clicking through.
redaction_checks: Account name, email address, permit numbers, application numbers, addresses, phone numbers, and private document labels must be absent or replaced by synthetic placeholders.
Queue item must not include cookies, tokens, local file paths, screenshots, traces, HAR content, or raw authenticated page values.
attendance_requirements: Human reviewer attendance is required for any future live DevHub comparison.
Manual review stops before any sign-in, account, payment, upload, scheduling, cancellation, submission, or certification control.
stop_before_action_gates: Stop before Sign In/Register, account settings, permit detail links, payment links, upload controls, scheduling controls, certification controls, or submit buttons.
Stop if the reviewer would need authenticated browser state or private account content to continue.

citations.quote_or_note: Synthetic page heading expectation: DevHub Home.
Synthetic accessible landmarks expected for read-only manual observation.
Synthetic redaction policy requires no private account values or browser artifacts.

observations.title: DevHub permit status read-only expectation review
validation_message_expectations: Empty synthetic search state should explain that a permit or request identifier is needed without exposing real identifiers.
Invalid synthetic search state should produce reviewer-visible text without triggering lookup, upload, payment, scheduling, cancellation, or submission.
redaction_checks: Permit numbers, IVR numbers, addresses, applicant names, contractor names, document filenames, status comments, and fee amounts must be synthetic placeholders.
No authenticated response body, private attachment list, screenshot, trace, HAR, cookie, token, or local download path may be included.
attendance_requirements: Human reviewer attendance is required for any future live DevHub comparison.
Manual review records only redacted, synthetic, read-only expectations and stops before official record navigation or mutation.
stop_before_action_gates: Stop before opening a real permit record, submitting a lookup, uploading corrections, paying fees, scheduling inspections, canceling, withdrawing, or certifying any statement.
Stop if resolving the expectation requires live authenticated DevHub navigation.

citations.quote_or_note: Synthetic page heading expectation: My Permits and Requests.
Synthetic validation-message expectations cover empty and invalid read-only states.
Synthetic gates stop before official record changes or private account navigation.
